news.title: Asian shares rise after rally on Wall Street as data show US inflation slowing
news.summary: Asian shares mostly rose Wednesday, tracking a rally on Wall Street following a report that showed U.S. inflation was not as bad last month as economists expected.  Hong Kong's Hang Seng edged up 1.6% to 24,721.10, while the Shanghai Composite lost 0.4% to 3,952.04.  Investors are also watching for earnings reports from various companies for the spring.
